import asyncio
from typing import Set

_background_tasks: Set[asyncio.Task] = set()

async def process_items(items: list):
    tasks = []
    for item in items:
        task = asyncio.create_task(transform(item))
        tasks.append(task)
        _background_tasks.add(task)
        task.add_done_callback(_background_tasks.discard)
    await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)

async def handle_request(data: dict):
    tasks = [
        asyncio.create_task(validate(data)),
        asyncio.create_task(audit_log(data)),
    ]
    _background_tasks.update(tasks)
    for t in tasks:
        t.add_done_callback(_background_tasks.discard)
    results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)
    for result in results:
        if isinstance(result, Exception):
            raise result
    return {"status": "ok"}

async def background_sync():
    while True:
        tasks = [
            asyncio.create_task(pull_remote_changes()),
            asyncio.create_task(push_local_changes()),
        ]
        _background_tasks.update(tasks)
        for t in tasks:
            t.add_done_callback(_background_tasks.discard)
        await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
        await asyncio.sleep(30)
